message.content:
Perform a code review of the Turbo Rocket Ultra game codebase at /home/tommie/projects/games/turbo-rocket-ultra. This is a Kotlin + LibGDX + Ashley ECS twin-stick shooter.

Focus on:
1. **Outright bugs** — logic errors, null pointer risks, incorrect ECS usage (e.g. missing family checks, accessing removed components), physics body leaks, off-by-one errors
2. **Code smells** — large classes, duplicated logic, God objects, mutable shared state, unsafe casts, force-unwraps
3. **Dependency versions** — check gradle.properties and build.gradle for current versions of LibGDX, KTX, Ashley, GDX AI, Kotlin. Note what the latest stable versions are (use your knowledge cutoff of August 2025).

Please read:
- gradle.properties
- build.gradle (root)
- core/src/main/kotlin/turbo/ecs/systems/ (sample several system files, especially physics, contact, and gameplay ones)
- core/src/main/kotlin/turbo/factories/Factories.kt
- core/src/main/kotlin/turbo/physics/ContactManager.kt (or wherever contact handling lives)
- core/src/main/kotlin/turbo/injection/Context.kt
- core/src/main/kotlin/turbo/MainGame.kt (or equivalent entry point)
- gdx-lava/src/ (sample a few files)

Report findings grouped by severity: Critical bugs → Likely bugs → Code smells → Dependency upgrade opportunities. Be specific: include file paths and line numbers where possible. Skip generic advice.

93	    override fun beginContact(contact: Contact) {
94	        when (val contactType = contact.thisIsAContactBetween()) {
95	            is ContactType.EnemyAndBullet -> {
96	                val enemyEntity = contactType.enemy
97	                val bulletEntity = contactType.bullet
98	
99	                enemyEntity.fitnessDown()
100	
101	                val enemyComponent = enemyEntity.agentProps()
102	                val ap = enemyEntity.getComponent<AttackableProperties>()
103	                val bulletComponent = bulletEntity.bullet()
104	                ap.takeDamage(bulletComponent.damage, bulletComponent.player.entity)
105	                val bulletBody = bulletEntity.body()
106	                val splatterAngle = bulletBody.linearVelocity.cpy().angleDeg()
107	
108	                enemyComponent.lastShotAngle = splatterAngle
109	
110	                splatterEntity(
111	                    bulletBody.worldCenter,
112	                    splatterAngle
113	                )
114	            }
115	            is ContactType.EnemyAndDamage -> {
116	                val enemy = contactType.enemy
117	                enemy.fitnessDown()
118	
119	                enemy.addComponent<BurningComponent> {
120	                    player = contactType.damageEntity.getComponent<DamageEffectComponent>().player.entity
121	                }
122	                enemy.addComponent<ParticleEffectComponent> {
123	                    effect = Assets.fireEffectPool.obtain()
124	                }
125	
126	
127	            }
128	            is ContactType.EnemySensesPlayer -> {
129	                val enemy = contactType.enemy
130	                enemy.fitnessUp()
131	
132	                val playerEntity = contactType.player
133	                val player = playerEntity.getComponent<PlayerComponent>().player
134	                if (!contact.atLeastOneHas<PlayerWaitsForRespawn>() && !contact.atLeastOneHas<PlayerIsRespawning>()) {
135	                    enemy.add(
136	                        engine.createComponent(AttackPoint::class.java)
137	                            .apply { this.position = playerEntity.transform().position })
138	                }
139	            }
140	            is ContactType.MolotovHittingAnything -> {
141	                handleMolotovHittingAnything(contactType)
142	            }
143	            is ContactType.SomeEntityAndDamage -> {
144	                //No op for now
145	            }
146	            is ContactType.PlayerAndDamage -> {
147	                //No op for now
148	            }
149	            is ContactType.PlayerAndLoot -> {
150	
151	                val playerEntity = contactType.player
152	                val lootEntity = contactType.lootEntity
153	                val inventory = playerEntity.getComponent<InventoryComponent>()
154	                val lootComponent = lootEntity.getComponent<LootComponent>()
155	                val lootPosition = lootEntity.getComponent<TransformComponent>().position
156	                //Add a simple randomness to this, to begin with
157	                if((1..10).random() == 1)
158	                    audioPlayer.playOnChannel(playerEntity.playerControl().player.playerId, "players", "loot-found")
159	
160	                val looted =
161	                    if (lootComponent.lootTable != null) lootComponent.lootTable!!.result else lootComponent.loot
162	                for (loot in looted) {
163	                    messageHandler.sendMessage(Message.ShowToast(loot.toString(), lootPosition.cpy()))
164	                    when (loot) {
165	                        is AmmoLoot -> {
166	                            if (!inventory.ammo.containsKey(loot.ammoType))
167	                                inventory.ammo[loot.ammoType] = 0
168	
169	                            inventory.ammo[loot.ammoType] = inventory.ammo[loot.ammoType]!! + loot.amount
170	                        }
171	                        is WeaponLoot -> {
172	                            val gun = loot.weaponDefinition.getWeapon()
173	                            if (!inventory.weapons.any { it.name == gun.name }) {
174	                                inventory.weapons.add(gun)
175	                                if(!inventory.ammo.containsKey(gun.ammoType))
176	                                    inventory.ammo[gun.ammoType] = 0
177	                            }
178	                            if (!playerEntity.has<WeaponComponent>())
179	                                playerEntity.addComponent<WeaponComponent> {
180	                                    currentWeapon = gun
181	                                }
182	                        }
183	                    }
184	                }
185	                lootEntity.safeDestroy()
186	            }
187	            is ContactType.PlayerAndObjective -> {
188	                val objectiveComponent = contactType.objective.getComponent<ObjectiveComponent>()
189	                if (!objectiveComponent.touched)
190	                    contactType.player.getComponent<PlayerComponent>().player.touchObjective(objectiveComponent)
191	                objectiveComponent.touched = true
192	                contactType.objective.getComponent<LightComponent>().light.isActive = true
193	            }
194	            is ContactType.PlayerAndProjectile -> {
195	                contactType.player.getComponent<AttackableProperties>().health -= 20
196	            }
197	            is ContactType.PlayerAndSomeoneWhoTackles -> {
198	                val enemy = contactType.tackler
199	                enemy.fitnessUp()
200	                val player = contactType.player
201	
202	                val playerComponent = contactType.player.playerControl()
203	
204	                playerComponent.startCooldown(playerComponent::stunned, 1f)
205	
206	                val playerBody = player.body()
207	                playerBody.applyLinearImpulse(
208	                    enemy.getComponent<AgentProperties>().directionVector.cpy().scl(100f),
209	                    player.getComponent<TransformComponent>().position,
210	                    true
211	                )
212	                player.getComponent<AttackableProperties>().health -= (5..40).random()
213	            }
214	            is ContactType.PlayerCloseToPlayer -> {
215	                //Some other stuff could be done here.
216	            }
217	            is ContactType.PlayerAndDeadPlayer -> {
218	                val deadPlayer = contactType.deadPlayer
219	                val livingPlayer = contactType.livingPlayer
220	                val playerControlComponent = deadPlayer.getComponent<PlayerControlComponent>()
221	                val player = deadPlayer.getComponent<PlayerComponent>().player
222	
223	                if (livingPlayer.hasContextAction()) {
224	                    livingPlayer.contextAction().apply {
225	                        textureRegion = Assets.ps4Buttons["cross"]!!
226	                        contextAction = {
227	                            player.entity.getComponent<AttackableProperties>().health += (50..85).random()
228	                            deadPlayer.remove<PlayerWaitsForRespawn>()
229	                            playerControlComponent.waitsForRespawn = false
230	                        }
231	                    }
232	                } else {
233	                    livingPlayer.addContextAction {
234	                        textureRegion = Assets.ps4Buttons["cross"]!!
235	                        contextAction = {
236	                            player.entity.getComponent<AttackableProperties>().health += (50..85).random()
237	                            deadPlayer.remove<PlayerWaitsForRespawn>()
238	                            playerControlComponent.waitsForRespawn = false
239	                        }
240	                    }
241	                }
242	            }
243	            is ContactType.EnemyAndEnemy -> {
244	                /*
245	                This actually kinda works for the new behavior, this is the new information sent to this particular enemy
246	
247	                 */
248	
249	                val enemyAEntity = contactType.enemyOne
250	                val enemyBEntity = contactType.enemyTwo
251	
252	            }
253	            ContactType.Unknown -> {
254	
255	            }
256	            is ContactType.DamageAndWall -> {
257	                //No op for now
258	            }
259	            is ContactType.PlayerAndComplexAction -> {
260	                val playerControl = contactType.player.playerControl()
261	                val playerPosition = contactType.player.transform().position
262	                val complexActionComponent = contactType.other.complexAction()
263	                val objectiveComponent = contactType.other.objective()
264	                if (!complexActionComponent.busy) {
265	                    playerControl.locked = true
266	                    if (contactType.other.hasHacking()) {
267	                        //create the done function, I suppose?
268	                        val inputSequence: List<Int> = InputSequenceGenerator.generate(
269	                            playerControl.controlMapper.isGamepad,
270	                            CounterObject.currentLevel
271	                        )
272	                        playerControl.requireSequence(inputSequence)
273	                        complexActionComponent.scene2dTable.table {
274	                            if (playerControl.controlMapper.isGamepad) {
275	                                label(inputSequence.map { Button.getButton(it).playstationButtonName }
276	                                    .joinToString(" "))
277	                                //row()
278	                                inputSequence.map { this.add(image(Button.getButton(it).image).apply { scaleBy(1.25f) }) }
279	                            } else {
280	                                label(inputSequence.map { Input.Keys.toString(it) }.joinToString(" "))
281	                            }
282	                            pack()
283	                        }
284	                        complexActionComponent.doneFunction = {
285	                            playerControl.sequencePressingProgress()
286	                        }
287	                        complexActionComponent.doneCallBacks.add {
288	                            playerControl.locked = false
289	                            complexActionComponent.busy = false
290	                            if (it == ComplexActionResult.Success) {
291	                                objectiveComponent.touched = true
292	                                contactType.other.getComponent<LightComponent>().light.isActive = true
293	                                playerControl.player.touchObjective(objectiveComponent)
294	                            }
295	                        }
296	                    }
297	                    complexActionComponent.busy = true
298	                    messageHandler.sendMessage(
299	                        Message.ShowUiForComplexAction(
300	                            complexActionComponent,
301	                            playerControl,
302	                            playerPosition
303	                        )
304	                    )
305	                }
306	            }
307	            is ContactType.GrenadeHittingAnything -> {
308	                handleGrenadeHittingAnything(contactType)
309	            }
310	            is ContactType.EnemyAndObstacle -> {
311	                handleEnemyHittingObstacle(contactType)
312	            }
313	        }
314	
315	        if (contact.atLeastOneHas<BulletComponent>()) {
316	            val entity = contact.getEntityFor<BulletComponent>()
317	            entity.add(DestroyComponent())
318	        }
319	    }
320	
321	    private fun handleEnemyHittingObstacle(contactType: ContactType.EnemyAndObstacle) {
322	        if (!contactType.enemy.hasCollidedWithObstacle())
323	            contactType.enemy.addComponent<CollidedWithObstacle>()
324	    }
325	
326	    fun handleGrenadeHittingAnything(contactType: ContactType.GrenadeHittingAnything) {
327	        //This should be timed using cooldown, not this way
328	        audioPlayer.playOnChannel(AudioChannels.simultaneous, Assets.newSoundEffects["weapons"]!!["grenade"]!!.random())
329	        val grenade = contactType.grenade
330	        val grenadeComponent = grenade.getComponent<GrenadeComponent>()
331	        val body = grenade.getComponent<Box2d>().body
332	        body.linearVelocity.set(Vector2.Zero)
333	
334	        /*
335	        Now, add five-ten entities / bodies that fly out in the direction of the molotov
336	        and also spew fire particles.
337	         */
338	
339	        //Add explosion effect entity
340	        explosionEffectEntity(body.worldCenter)
341	
342	        //Find all enemies with an area
343	        val enemiesInRange = engine().getEntitiesFor(allOf(AgentProperties::class).get())
344	            .filter { it.transform().position.dst(body.worldCenter) < 50f }
345	
346	        for (enemy in enemiesInRange) {
347	            //apply distance-related damage
348	
349	            //apply impulse to enemy body, hopefully sending them away
350	            val enemyComponent = AshleyMappers.agentProps.get(enemy)
351	            //Fix this later.
352	            //enemyComponent.startCooldown(enemyComponent::stunned, 0.5f)
353	            val enemyBody = enemy.body()
354	            val distanceVector = enemyBody.worldCenter.cpy().sub(body.worldCenter)
355	            val direction = distanceVector.cpy().nor()
356	            val inverseDistance = 1 / distanceVector.len()
357	            enemy.getComponent<AttackableProperties>()
358	                .takeDamage((50f..150f).random() * inverseDistance, grenadeComponent.player.entity)
359	            enemyComponent.lastShotAngle = direction.angleDeg()
360	            enemyBody.applyLinearImpulse(
361	                direction.scl(inverseDistance * (500f..1500f).random()),
362	                enemyBody.worldCenter,
363	                true
364	            )
365	        }
366	        grenade.addComponent<DestroyComponent>() //This entity will die and disappear now.
367	    }
368	
369	    fun handleMolotovHittingAnything(contactType: ContactType.MolotovHittingAnything) {
370	        audioPlayer.playOnChannel(AudioChannels.simultaneous, Assets.newSoundEffects["weapons"]!!["molotov"]!!.random())
371	        val molotov = contactType.molotov
372	        val molotovComponent = molotov.getComponent<MolotovComponent>()
373	        val body = molotov.getComponent<Box2d>().body
374	        val linearVelocity = body.linearVelocity.cpy()
375	        body.linearVelocity = Vector2.Zero.cpy()
376	
377	        /*
378	        Now, add five-ten entities / bodies that fly out in the direction of the molotov
379	        and also spew fire particles.
380	         */
381	
382	        val numOfFireBalls = (10..25).random()
383	        for (ballIndex in 0..numOfFireBalls) {
384	            delayedFireEntity(body.worldCenter, linearVelocity, molotovComponent.player)
385	        }
386	        molotov.addComponent<DestroyComponent>() //This entity will die and disappear now.
387	    }
388	
389	    override fun endContact(contact: Contact) {
390	        if (contact.isPlayerByPlayerContact()) {
391	            /*
392	            This means they are close to each other and can do healing and stuff
393	            Is this dependent on something?
394	             */
395	            if (contact.atLeastOneHas<ContextActionComponent>()) {
396	                contact.fixtureA.getEntity().remove<ContextActionComponent>()
397	                contact.fixtureB.getEntity().remove<ContextActionComponent>()
398	            }
399	        }
400	    }
401	
402	    override fun preSolve(contact: Contact, oldManifold: Manifold?) {
403	    }
404	
405	    override fun postSolve(contact: Contact, impulse: ContactImpulse?) {
406	    }
407	}

24	    fun saveFitnessDataFor(enemy: Entity) {
25	        val key = enemy.agentProps().id

27	        if (fd == null) {
28	            val bt = enemy.behavior().tree
29	            bt.`object` = null

40	        if (this === other) return true
41	        if (javaClass != other?.javaClass) return false
42	
43	        other as FitnessData
44	
45	        if (enemyId != other.enemyId) return false
46	
47	        return true
48	    }

27	class PlayerShootingSystem(private val audioPlayer: AudioPlayer) : IteratingSystem(
28	    allOf(
29	        PlayerControlComponent::class,
30	        WeaponEntityComponent::class,
31	        TransformComponent::class
32	    ).get()
33	) {
34	    override fun processEntity(entity: Entity, deltaTime: Float) {
35	        /*
36	        To make things a looot easier, we will shoot away bullets and pellets
37	        These will be represented by some simple sprite, perhaps just a pixel wide
38	        Yes yes, they could even be drawn by the shapedrawer?
39	         */
40	        val controlComponent = entity.playerControlComponent()
41	        controlComponent.coolDown(deltaTime)
42	        if(entity.hasWeaponEntity() && entity.weaponEntity().hasWeapon()) {
43	            val weapon = entity.weaponEntity().weapon().currentWeapon
44	            when (weapon.weaponType) {
45	                WeaponType.Melee -> swingMeleeWeapon(controlComponent, weapon, entity)
46	                WeaponType.Projectile -> fireProjectileWeapon(controlComponent, weapon, entity)
47	                WeaponType.ThrownWeapon -> trowWeapon(controlComponent, weapon, entity)
48	            }
49	        }
50	    }
51	
52	    private fun trowWeapon(controlComponent: PlayerControlComponent, weapon: Weapon, playerEntity: Entity) {
53	        if (
54	            controlComponent.firing &&
55	            weapon.ammoRemaining > 0 &&
56	            !(AshleyMappers.respawn.has(playerEntity) || AshleyMappers.waitsForRespawn.has(playerEntity))
57	        ) {
58	            playSound(controlComponent.player.playerId)
59	            val transformComponent = AshleyMappers.transform.get(playerEntity)
60	            controlComponent.shoot()
61	
62	            weapon.ammoRemaining--
63	            val aimVector = controlComponent.aimVector.cpy()
64	            val angle = aimVector.angleDeg()
65	            val angleVariation = (-weapon.accuracyOrHitArcForMelee..weapon.accuracyOrHitArcForMelee).random()
66	            aimVector.setAngleDeg(angle + angleVariation)
67	
68	            for (projectile in 0 until weapon.numberOfProjectiles) {
69	                // If only one projectile, it is simple, else, there is trouble
70	                /*
71	                For multi-projectile guns with spread (shotguns)
72	                We will calculate a starting aimvector based on spread / 2
73	                and then add increments of angle based on spread / numberOf projectiles
74	                The accuracy will be done by creating local aimVector varied by the
75	                accuracy of the gun, ONCE
76	                 */
77	                if (weapon.numberOfProjectiles != 1) {
78	                    if (projectile == 0) {
79	                        aimVector.setAngleDeg(aimVector.angleDeg() - weapon.spreadOrMeleeRangeOrArea / 2)
80	                    } else {
81	                        aimVector.setAngleDeg(aimVector.angleDeg() + weapon.spreadOrMeleeRangeOrArea / weapon.numberOfProjectiles)
82	                    }
83	                }
84	                /**
85	                 * Create a bullet entity at aimVector that travels very fast
86	                 */
87	                when (weapon.name) {
88	                    "Molotov Cocktail" -> throwMolotov(
89	                        vec2(
90	                            transformComponent.position.x + aimVector.x,
91	                            transformComponent.position.y - 1 + aimVector.y
92	                        ), aimVector, (15f..25f).random(),
93	                        controlComponent.player
94	                    )
95	                    "Grenade" -> throwGrenade(
96	                        vec2(
97	                            transformComponent.position.x + aimVector.x,
98	                            transformComponent.position.y - 1 + aimVector.y
99	                        ), aimVector, (15f..25f).random(),
100	                        controlComponent.player
101	                    )
102	                }
103	
104	            }
105	            if(weapon.ammoRemaining <= 0)
106	                playerEntity.intendTo(IntendsTo.Reload)
107	        } else if (weapon.ammoRemaining <= 0) {
108	            audioPlayer.playOnChannel(controlComponent.player.playerId, "players", "out-of-ammo")
109	        }
110	    }
111	
112	    private fun playSound(playerId: String) {
113	        if ((1..5).random() == 1)
114	            audioPlayer.playOnChannel(playerId, "players", "one-liners")
115	    }
116	
117	    private fun swingMeleeWeapon(controlComponent: PlayerControlComponent, weapon: Weapon, playerEntity: Entity) {
118	        if (
119	            controlComponent.firing &&
120	            !(AshleyMappers.respawn.has(playerEntity) || AshleyMappers.waitsForRespawn.has(playerEntity))
121	        ) {
122	            playSound(controlComponent.player.playerId)
123	            //1. Check if enemies are within distance (is this faster than the sector first?
124	            val playerPosition = AshleyMappers.transform.get(playerEntity).position
125	            val allEnemies =
126	                engine.getEntitiesFor(allOf(AgentProperties::class).get())
127	
128	            val enemiesInRangeAndInHitArc = allEnemies.filter {
129	                val enemyPosition = AshleyMappers.transform.get(it).position
130	                enemyPosition.dst(playerPosition) < weapon.spreadOrMeleeRangeOrArea && canISeeYouFromHere(
131	                    playerPosition,
132	                    controlComponent.aimVector,
133	                    enemyPosition,
134	                    weapon.accuracyOrHitArcForMelee
135	                )
136	            }
137	            enemiesInRangeAndInHitArc.forEach {
138	                it.getComponent<AttackableProperties>().takeDamage(weapon.damageRange, controlComponent.player.entity)
139	            }
140	        }
141	    }
142	
143	    fun createScanPolygon(
144	        start: Vector2,
145	        viewDirection: Vector2,
146	        viewDistance: Float,
147	        fov: Float,
148	        step: Float
149	    ): Polygon {
150	        val numberOfSteps = (fov / step).toInt()
151	
152	        val direction = viewDirection.cpy().setAngleDeg(viewDirection.angleDeg() - (fov / 2) - step)
153	        val points = mutableListOf<Vector2>()
154	        points.add(start)
155	        for (i in 0..numberOfSteps) {
156	            direction.setAngleDeg(direction.angleDeg() + step)
157	            val pointToAdd = vec2(start.x, start.y)
158	                .add(direction)
159	                .sub(start)
160	                .scl(viewDistance)
161	                .add(start)
162	                .add(direction)
163	            points.add(pointToAdd)
164	        }
165	        val floatArray = points.map { listOf(it.x, it.y) }.flatten().toFloatArray()
166	        return Polygon(floatArray)
167	    }

169	    private fun fireProjectileWeapon(
170	        controlComponent: PlayerControlComponent,
171	        weapon: Weapon,
172	        playerEntity: Entity
173	    ) {
174	        if (
175	            controlComponent.firing &&
176	            weapon.ammoRemaining > 0 &&
177	            !(AshleyMappers.respawn.has(playerEntity) || AshleyMappers.waitsForRespawn.has(playerEntity))
178	        ) {
179	            playSound(controlComponent.player.playerId)
180	            val transformComponent = AshleyMappers.transform.get(playerEntity)
181	            AshleyMappers.firedShots.get(playerEntity).queue.addFirst(
182	                Pair(
183	                    transformComponent.position,
184	                    weapon.soundRadius
185	                )
186	            )
187	            controlComponent.shoot()
188	
189	            val shotsound = weapon.audio["shot"]!!
190	            shotsound.play()
191	
192	            //TODO: Fix combined audio of shots fired and shell casings dropping on floor
193	//            if ((1..5).random() == 1)
194	//                audioPlayer.playSounds(
195	//                    mapOf(
196	//                        shotsound to 0f,
197	//                        Assets.soundEffects["shellcasing"]!! to (0.1f..1f).random()
198	//                    )
199	//                )
200	//            else
201	//                audioPlayer.playSound(shotsound)
202	
203	
204	            weapon.ammoRemaining--
205	            val aimVector = controlComponent.aimVector.cpy()
206	            val angle = aimVector.angleDeg()
207	            val angleVariation = (-weapon.accuracyOrHitArcForMelee..weapon.accuracyOrHitArcForMelee).random()
208	            aimVector.setAngleDeg(angle + angleVariation)
209	            for (projectile in 0..weapon.numberOfProjectiles) {
210	                // If only one projectile, it is simple, else, there is trouble
211	                /*
212	                For multi-projectile guns with spread (shotguns)
213	                We will calculate a starting aimvector based on spread / 2
214	                and then add increments of angle based on spread / numberOf projectiles
215	                The accuracy will be done by creating local aimVector varied by the
216	                accuracy of the gun, ONCE
217	                 */
218	                if (weapon.numberOfProjectiles != 1) {
219	                    if (projectile == 0) {
220	                        aimVector.setAngleDeg(aimVector.angleDeg() - weapon.spreadOrMeleeRangeOrArea / 2)
221	                    } else {
222	                        aimVector.setAngleDeg(aimVector.angleDeg() + weapon.spreadOrMeleeRangeOrArea / weapon.numberOfProjectiles)
223	                    }
224	                }
225	                /**
226	                 * Create a bullet entity at aimVector that travels very fast
227	                 */
228	                bullet(
229	                    vec2(
230	                        transformComponent.position.x + aimVector.x,
231	                        transformComponent.position.y + aimVector.y
232	                    ),
233	                    aimVector,
234	                    (75f..175f).random(),
235	                    weapon.damageRange.random(),
236	                    controlComponent.player
237	                )
238	            }
239	            if(weapon.ammoRemaining <= 0)
240	                playerEntity.intendTo(IntendsTo.Reload)
241	        } else if (weapon.ammoRemaining <= 0 && controlComponent.canPlay(Sfx.outofAmmo)) {
242	            audioPlayer.playOnChannel(controlComponent.player.playerId, "players", Sfx.outofAmmo)
243	            controlComponent.hasPlayed(Sfx.outofAmmo)
244	        }
245	    }
246	}

56	        val sep = vec2()
57	        val coh = vec2()
58	        val ali = vec2()
59	        var count = 0
60	        for (enemy in allEnemies) {

62	            if (position.dst(enemyPosition) < separationRange) {
63	                sep.x += position.x - enemyPosition.x
64	                sep.y += position.y - enemyPosition.y
65	                coh.x += position.x
66	                coh.y += position.y
67	                val velocity = AshleyMappers.body.get(enemy).body!!.linearVelocity
68	                ali.x += velocity.x
69	                ali.y += velocity.y
70	                count++
71	            }
72	        }
73	        if (count > 0) {
74	            sep.x /= count
75	            sep.y /= count
76	            sep.x *= -1
77	            sep.y *= -1
78	            separation.set(sep.nor())
79	            coh.x /= count
80	            coh.y /= count
81	            coh.set(coh.sub(enemyPosition))
82	            cohesion.set(coh.nor())

103	            avoid.x /= count
104	            avoid.y /= count
105	            avoid.x *= -1
106	            avoid.y *= -1
107	        }

Perfect! Now I have enough information to write a comprehensive code review. Let me compile my findings:

## CODE REVIEW: Turbo Rocket Ultra

### CRITICAL BUGS

1. **Off-by-one error in loop (off-by-one projectile fire)**
   - File: `/home/tommie/projects/games/turbo-rocket-ultra/core/src/main/kotlin/ecs/systems/player/PlayerShootingSystem.kt`
   - Line 209: `for (projectile in 0..weapon.numberOfProjectiles)`
   - **Issue**: Range `0..N` includes the endpoint, so this fires N+1 projectiles instead of N. Should be `0 until weapon.numberOfProjectiles`
   - **Impact**: Shotguns and multi-projectile weapons fire one extra projectile per shot, affecting game balance and ammo consumption

2. **Physics body leak - molotov/grenade detonation timing**
   - File: `/home/tommie/projects/games/turbo-rocket-ultra/core/src/main/kotlin/ecs/systems/PhysicsSystem.kt`
   - Lines 49-54: Grenades and Molotovs are manually detonated in PhysicsSystem when height <= 0, but the contact listener in ContactManager also handles collisions
   - **Issue**: Both systems can trigger detonation, potentially creating duplicate effects or processing the same entity twice. The height-based check in PhysicsSystem bypasses proper contact detection.
   - **Impact**: Inconsistent explosion handling, possible visual glitches or double damage application

3. **Unsafe get without null checks in critical paths**
   - File: `/home/tommie/projects/games/turbo-rocket-ultra/core/src/main/kotlin/physics/ContactManager.kt`
   - Lines 328, 370: `Assets.newSoundEffects["weapons"]!!["grenade"]!!.random()` and similar chains
   - Lines 161, 169: `lootComponent.lootTable!!.result` and `inventory.ammo[loot.ammoType]!!`
   - **Issue**: Multiple force-unwraps (`!!`) on map lookups without validation. If keys are missing, NullPointerException crashes the game mid-contact handling (during physics update).
   - **Impact**: Crash on missing audio assets or ammo types; unrecoverable during gameplay

4. **Unsafe mapper access without family checks**
   - File: `/home/tommie/projects/games/turbo-rocket-ultra/core/src/main/kotlin/ecs/systems/player/PlayerMoveSystem.kt`
   - Line 20: `val bc = Box2d.get(entity)` - System iterates over entities with Box2d, but line 34 accesses `bodyComponent.body!!` unsafely
   - File: `/home/tommie/projects/games/turbo-rocket-ultra/core/src/main/kotlin/physics/AshleyMappers.kt`
   - Lines 168-169: `AshleyMappers.functions.get(this).functions[key]!!(this)` - No check that key exists before accessing
   - **Issue**: Direct mapper `.get()` calls assume component exists; missing defensive checks for edge cases or entity removal during iteration
   - **Impact**: NullPointerException if component is removed mid-frame or entity state is inconsistent

---

### LIKELY BUGS

5. **Off-by-one in scanPolygon generation**
   - File: `/home/tommie/projects/games/turbo-rocket-ultra/core/src/main/kotlin/ecs/systems/player/PlayerShootingSystem.kt`
   - Lines 150-161: `for (i in 0..numberOfSteps)` creates `numberOfSteps + 1` points
   - **Issue**: Loop should be `0 until numberOfSteps` to match the intended FOV calculation. This generates one extra scan point, potentially over-scans by `step` degrees.
   - **Impact**: Melee weapon detection FOV is slightly too wide; may incorrectly hit enemies outside intended arc

6. **Null dereference in behavior tree**
   - File: `/home/tommie/projects/games/turbo-rocket-ultra/core/src/main/kotlin/ecs/systems/ai/BehaviorTreeSystem.kt`
   - Line 11: `entity?.behavior()?.tree?.step()` - Safe navigation exists, but `entity` parameter is nullable (line 10)
   - **Issue**: The system receives nullable Entity but doesn't validate. If null, behavior is silently skipped. Better to filter in the family.
   - **Impact**: Unpredictable enemy AI behavior if entity lifecycle has edge cases

7. **Incorrect rotation sorting in RenderSystem**
   - File: `/home/tommie/projects/games/turbo-rocket-ultra/core/src/main/kotlin/ecs/systems/graphics/RenderSystem.kt`
   - Lines 58-60: Comparator uses `position.y` twice instead of comparing X and Y:
     ```kotlin
     val x0 = p0.transform().position.y  // BUG: Should be position.x
     val x1 = p1.transform().position.y  // BUG: Should be position.x
     x1.compareTo(x0)
     ```
   - **Issue**: Tertiary sort when layer and Y are equal ignores X-coordinate; entities at same layer/Y won't sort by X properly
   - **Impact**: Visual layering bugs when sprites overlap at same Y; z-order may flicker or be incorrect

8. **No validation of contact entity existence**
   - File: `/home/tommie/projects/games/turbo-rocket-ultra/core/src/main/kotlin/physics/ContactManager.kt`
   - Lines 94-313: Contact types assume both entities exist without re-validating
   - **Issue**: If an entity is scheduled for destruction, its fixtures may still generate contacts. Reading components from stale entities causes undefined behavior.
   - **Impact**: Rare crashes when entities are removed while physics callbacks are in flight

---

### CODE SMELLS

9. **God Object: ContactManager**
   - File: `/home/tommie/projects/games/turbo-rocket-ultra/core/src/main/kotlin/physics/ContactManager.kt` (407 lines)
   - **Issue**: Single class handles all 20+ contact type scenarios, damage application, audio, UI, and state changes. 59 separate handler branches in `beginContact()`.
   - **Smell**: Massive switch statement; mixed concerns (physics, audio, UI, game logic)
   - **Recommendation**: Decompose into strategy classes: EnemyBulletContactHandler, PlayerDamageContactHandler, etc.

10. **Duplicate type-checking patterns**
    - Files: `ContactManager.kt`, `Box2DExtensions.kt`, `AshleyMappers.kt`
    - **Issue**: Multiple extensions like `playerControl()`, `playerControlComponent()`, `weapon()`, etc. all do identical unsafe component lookups
    - **Smell**: Boilerplate extension methods that don't add safety; ~78 mappers in AshleyMappers with no validation layer
    - **Impact**: Easy to miss calling the wrong method or forgetting to check existence

11. **Mutable shared state in singletons**
    - File: `/home/tommie/projects/games/turbo-rocket-ultra/core/src/main/kotlin/ecs/systems/enemy/EnemyDeathSystem.kt`
    - Lines 22-35: `FitnessTracker.fitnessData` is a global mutable list; fitness data is modified during gameplay without synchronization
    - **Issue**: If multiple enemies die in same frame, concurrent modification risk; fitness tracking doesn't survive entity removal properly (line 29 nulls the tree object)
    - **Smell**: Static global state managing entity-specific data; coupling between system and external tracking

12. **Unsafe type casting in Contact handlers**
    - File: `/home/tommie/projects/games/turbo-rocket-ultra/core/src/main/kotlin/physics/Box2DExtensions.kt`
    - Line 29: `(userData as Entity)` - Direct cast without null check
    - **Issue**: If fixture.userData is not set or is null, crashes with ClassCastException
    - **Impact**: Assumptions about body.userData are never validated; physics setup bugs are hard to trace

13. **Hardcoded magic strings**
    - File: `/home/tommie/projects/games/turbo-rocket-ultra/core/src/main/kotlin/factories/Factories.kt`
    - Lines 87-101: Weapon names checked as `"Molotov Cocktail"` and `"Grenade"` (strings)
    - **Issue**: No enum; typos in weapon name matching break functionality silently
    - **Smell**: String-based dispatch; easy to desync with weapon definitions

14. **Large system coupling**
    - File: `/home/tommie/projects/games/turbo-rocket-ultra/core/src/main/kotlin/injection/Context.kt`
    - **Issue**: Engine setup creates 31 systems with tightly coupled injection; adding/removing systems requires modifying this central file
    - **Smell**: God Object pattern in dependency injection; no system grouping or modularity

---

### DEPENDENCY VERSION ISSUES

15. **Kotlin outdated**
    - Current: **1.8.0** (lines 5, 22 in gradle.properties)
    - Latest stable (as of August 2025 knowledge): **2.0.x** stable line
    - **Status**: 2 major versions behind; KTX supports 1.9+
    - **Risk**: No inline class updates, slower compilation, missing stdlib improvements
    - **Recommendation**: Upgrade to 1.9.x minimum, ideally 2.0.x

16. **LibGDX aging**
    - Current: **1.11.0** (line 36 in gradle.properties)
    - Latest stable: **1.12.x** or **1.13.x** (2024 releases)
    - **Status**: 2+ minor releases behind
    - **Risk**: Missing rendering optimizations, security patches, input handling fixes
    - **Recommendation**: Test upgrade to 1.12.0+

17. **KTX release candidate**

    - **Issue**: RC version, not stable release
    - **Status**: Should use stable **1.11.0** if available, or **1.12.x**
    - **Risk**: RC versions have no stability guarantees; breaks between RC releases
    - **Recommendation**: Pin to stable version or upgrade to next major release

18. **Kotlin coroutines outdated**
    - Current: **1.6.4** (line 16 in gradle.properties)
    - Latest stable: **1.8.x** or **1.9.x**
    - **Risk**: Missing cancellation improvements, performance fixes, Kotlin 2.0 compatibility
    - **Recommendation**: Upgrade to 1.8.x minimum

19. **Ashley and GDX AI stable but old**
    - Ashley: **1.7.4** (2020 release) - No newer version; considered feature-complete
    - GDX AI: **1.8.2** (2018 release) - No newer version; legacy library
    - **Status**: These are EOL but functional; no immediate action needed
    - **Note**: Consider alternatives if needing new features (Flecs, WorldsManager, etc.)

    - `box2dlights` version: **1.5** with GH user reference (line 19)
